title: bidens anthemoides
intro: Bidens anthemoides, also known as bitter beggarticks, is a perennial herb in the aster family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation and relieve digestive issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and acting as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Bidens anthemoides often include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects.
